name: Nelson Mandela
description: South African anti-apartheid revolutionary, political leader, and philanthropist who became South Africa's first democratically elected president.
significance: Central figure in ending apartheid and promoting reconciliation in South Africa.
notes: Also known by his clan name, Madiba. Birthday recognized as Nelson Mandela International Day.

name: Bob Marley
description: Jamaican singer, songwriter, and musician who became a global icon of reggae music.
significance: Brought reggae to a global audience and used music to advocate for social justice and unity.
